tools.name: search_fliplet_docs
tools.description: Fuzzy-search the Fliplet developer documentation index (llms.txt). Returns ranked matches with title, URL, description, group, and relevance score.

tools.name: fetch_fliplet_doc
tools.description: Fetch the raw Markdown source of a single Fliplet developer documentation page. URL must be under developers.fliplet.com and end in .md.
